NOTICE OF MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENTAGON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PENTAGON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 20, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 28, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF PENTAGON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S ORDER ISSUED ON MAY 28, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the court's order issued on May 28, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Continued To Jun-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PENTAGON FEDERAL CREDIT UNION's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to June 20, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 28, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
